commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate the Ghost fingerprint package — artifact shape and the node graph (links resolve, one root, acyclic). Defaults to .ghost.
commands.summary: Validate the fingerprint: artifact shape + the node graph.

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: init
commands.description: Create a root .ghost node fingerprint package

options.name: package
options.description: Exact fingerprint package directory to initialize

options.name: template
options.description: Init template to scaffold (default: default)

options.name: force
options.description: Overwrite existing Ghost fingerprint files

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Report sparse fingerprint package contribution facets: intent, inventory, composition, and the next BYOA step.

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: cli or json

commands.name: signals
commands.description: Emit deterministic raw repo signals as JSON: package manifests, language histogram, candidate config files, registry presence, top-level tree, and git remote.
commands.summary: Emit raw repo signals for fingerprint authoring.

commands.name: gather
commands.description: Gather the composed context slice for a surface (the right context at the right time).
commands.summary: Gather the composed context slice for a surface.

options.name: package
options.description: Use this fingerprint package directory (default: ./.ghost)

options.name: as
options.description: Filter to one incarnation (e.g. email, billboard, voice). Essence (untagged) nodes always pass.

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json

commands.name: checks
commands.description: Select the markdown checks (ghost.check/v1) relevant to the named surfaces.
commands.summary: Select and ground the checks relevant to a diff, by surface.

options.name: surface
options.description: Surface id(s) the change touches (comma-separated or repeated). The agent names them.

options.name: package
options.description: Use this fingerprint package directory (default: ./.ghost)

options.name: as
options.description: Filter grounding to one incarnation (e.g. email, voice). Essence nodes always pass.

options.name: grounding
options.description: Omit fingerprint grounding (the grounded nodes) and emit only the relevant checks

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json

commands.name: migrate
commands.description: Migrate a legacy .ghost/ package onto the directory-tree node model.
commands.summary: Migrate a legacy .ghost/ package onto the surface model.

options.name: dryRun
options.description: Print the migration plan and report; write nothing

options.name: force
options.description: Overwrite existing facet files with the migrated form

options.name: format
options.description: Report format: cli or json

commands.name: skill
commands.description: Install the unified Ghost skill bundle.

options.name: dest
options.description: Install destination (default: detected agent skills directory + /ghost)

options.name: agent
options.description: Agent destination to use when --dest is omitted: claude, cursor, codex, opencode

options.name: force
options.description: Overwrite an existing installed Ghost skill

commands.name: review
commands.description: Emit an evidence-routed advisory review prompt from the fingerprint package and a git diff.
commands.summary: Emit an advisory packet from fingerprint facets and a diff.

options.name: base
options.description: Git ref to diff against (default: HEAD)

options.name: diff
options.description: Unified diff file to embed in the review instead of running git diff. Use '-' for stdin.

options.name: surface
options.description: Surface id(s) the change touches (comma-separated or repeated). The agent names them.

options.name: package
options.description: Exact fingerprint package directory; bypasses stack discovery

options.name: maxDiffBytes
options.description: Maximum diff bytes to include in the review packet (default: 200000)

options.name: format
options.description: Output format: markdown or json
